local_dishes.name: Thatte Idli
local_dishes.description: Soft, plate-sized idlis that are incredibly fluffy and served with coconut chutney and sambar; a staple Karnataka breakfast that feels light yet filling
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Benne Dosa (Butter Dosa)
local_dishes.description: Crisp on the outside and soft inside, generously layered with butter, giving it a rich, indulgent flavour
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Set Dosa
local_dishes.description: A trio of soft, spongy dosas served with vegetable kurma — comforting and mildly spiced
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Ragi Mudde with Chicken/Mutton Curry
local_dishes.description: A traditional powerhouse meal made of finger millet balls paired with rich, spicy gravies — deeply rooted in Karnataka cuisine
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Kori Gassi (Chicken Curry) with Neer Dosa
local_dishes.description: A Mangalorean-style coconut-based chicken curry, slightly spicy and incredibly flavourful, paired with delicate rice crepes
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Mutton Pepper Fry
local_dishes.description: Bold, pepper-forward dry preparation with intense flavours — perfect for those who enjoy spice and depth
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Fish Curry (Coastal Style)
local_dishes.description: Tangy, coconut-based curry with fresh catch, often infused with tamarind and local spices
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Bisi Bele Bath
local_dishes.description: A wholesome rice-lentil dish cooked with vegetables and a signature spice blend — warm, comforting, and slightly tangy
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Akki Roti
local_dishes.description: A rustic rice flour flatbread, lightly spiced and often paired with chutney or curry — simple yet flavourful
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: South Indian Meals (Banana Leaf Thali)
local_dishes.description: A complete spread of rice, sambar, rasam, vegetables, curd, and pickles served traditionally on a banana leaf
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Mangalore Buns
local_dishes.description: Slightly sweet, fluffy deep-fried bread made from fermented banana dough — best enjoyed hot
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Goli Baje (Mangalore Bajji)
local_dishes.description: Crispy, golden fritters with a soft interior, typically served with coconut chutney — addictive and light
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

safety_tips.tip: Always keep fuel above half tank in forest and ghat sections (especially Chikkamagaluru–Sringeri–Thirthahalli stretch)
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

safety_tips.tip: Avoid late-night driving in ghat roads and elephant corridor zones
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

safety_tips.tip: Network can be patchy in forest belts — download offline Google Maps in advance
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

safety_tips.tip: Keep physical ID proofs (Aadhar/passport copy) for hotels and temple entries
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

safety_tips.tip: Do not leave valuables visible inside the car during sightseeing stops
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

safety_tips.tip: In wildlife zones (Sakrebyle Elephant Camp), follow instructions strictly and maintain silence around animals
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx

safety_tips.tip: Roads in Western Ghats may get slippery during sudden rain — drive cautiously
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Pratheek_Karnataka_All Inclusive Guide.docx
